name: kkiyama117-flow-tools
description: Personal Claude Code plugins for kkiyama117 — workflow automation built on top of the chezmoi-managed claude-tools Go binaries.

plugins.name: kkiyama117-flow-tools
plugins.description: Personal slash commands for tmux + worktree spawn workflows. Wraps the claude-tools Go binaries (claude-tmux-new, claude-cockpit-*, claude-notify-*).
